description:
## Background

`bsm-kia.12` requires every consumer of harness inputs to switch
to the typed parser before the contract step removes the raw env
reads. With the parser expanded (`bsm-kia.12.1`), the migrate
batch is per-directory: the wdio config at the repo root and the
two specs that branch on `process.env.BEADSMITH_E2E_PHASE` switch
in one commit.

This sub-issue covers the migration for all three files in one
batch:
- `wdio.issue-list.conf.ts`
- `e2e/issue-list/issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`
- `e2e/issue-list/issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts`

(`issue-list.success.spec.ts` and `issue-list.empty.spec.ts` do
not currently read these env vars and need no change.)

## What to build

Replace every raw `process.env.BEADSMITH_E2E_*` (and the inline
`Scenario` / `Phase` parsing) in the three files above with a
call to the new `parseHarnessEnvironment` from `run-scenario.ts`
(or sibling). Behavior and error reporting stay equivalent;
only the source of the typed inputs changes.

## Technical Approach

- Import `parseHarnessEnvironment` (and types as needed) from
  `e2e/issue-list/scripts/run-scenario.ts` (or sibling helper) in
  each of the three files.
- In `wdio.issue-list.conf.ts`: replace every
  `process.env.BEADSMITH_E2E_*` read and the chained
  `if/else if` `Scenario` mapping with typed fields from the
  parser output. Replace the per-`if` validation error strings
  with the parser's consolidated error.
- In each of the two specs: replace the
  `process.env.BEADSMITH_E2E_PHASE ?? "1"` reads and the
  `phase === "1" | "2"` branching inside `it()` blocks with the
  typed `phase` field from `HarnessInputs`.
- Keep the existing WebDriverIO imports (`browser`, `$`,
  `before`, etc.) untouched.

## Considerations

- Spec files should receive their `HarnessInputs` from somewhere
  â€” typically `before()` reads the parser output and stores the
  typed fields on a closure or shared object.
- The consolidated error message from the parser may differ in
  text from the existing per-`if` errors; that's expected and is
  what the parent epic's acceptance criteria require.
- The launcher (`run-scenario.ts`) is the only env producer; do
  not change the env vars it exports.
- Doing all three files in one commit is acceptable because each
  is straightforward and `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` proves
  end-to-end green at the directory boundary.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `wdio.issue-list.conf.ts`,
      `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`, and
      `issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts` all read harness inputs
      only through the new typed parser.
- [ ] No `process.env.BEADSMITH_E2E_*` lookup, inline
      `Scenario` / `Phase` parsing chain, or per-`if` validation
      error string remains in any of the three files.
- [ ] All three files' runtime behavior matches the previous
      version (modulo the consolidated error message).
- [ ] `rg "process\.env\.BEADSMITH_E2E_" wdio.issue-list.conf.ts e2e/issue-list/issue-list.restoration.spec.ts e2e/issue-list/issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts`
      returns zero hits.

## Test Plan

- Run `pnpm test` and `pnpm exec ultracite check` â€” both must
  pass.
- Run `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` to prove all four scenarios
  still pass end to end.
- Run `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` to prove the order-changed
  matrix still passes.
title: Migrate wdio config + 2 specs to typed harness parser
